news.t: Direxion Unveils AMD Single Stock Leveraged and Inverse ETFs

holdings.infoBox: AMDD is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 62.60%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 31.08%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 7.46%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 5.93%, and Cash at 0.00%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AMD Bear 1X ETF (AMDD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of AMD stock. AMDD was launched on Feb 12, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Direxion Unveils AMD Single Stock Leveraged and Inverse ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK, NY / ACCESS Newswire / February 12, 2025 / Direxion, a leading provider of tradeable ETFs, today announced bringing an additional pair of Single Stock Leveraged and Inverse ETFs to market. T...
